name: DDC CWICR - Text Estimator v11 (AI Nodes)

parameters.content:
⭐ **Star us on GitHub!**

[github.com/datadrivenconstruction/DDC-CWICR](https://github.com/datadrivenconstruction/OpenConstructionEstimate-DDC-CWICR)

**DDC CWICR** — Open Source Construction Cost Database
- 55,000+ work items
- 9 languages
- Free forever

## 🔐 Credentials Setup

### 🔑 TOKEN node:
- `bot_token` - Telegram Bot API
- `QDRANT_URL` - Qdrant server
- `QDRANT_API_KEY` - Qdrant auth

### n8n Credentials (Settings → Credentials):
- **OpenAI API** - for LLM + Embeddings
- **Anthropic API** - (optional) for Claude
- **Google Gemini API** - (optional) for Gemini

### To switch AI models:
1. Disable current model node
2. Enable alternative model
3. Models auto-connect to chain

## ✅ SETUP CHECKLIST

**1. Telegram Bot**
- [ ] Create via @BotFather
- [ ] Token in 🔑 TOKEN

**2. n8n Credentials**
- [ ] Add OpenAI credential
- [ ] Link to Model nodes

**3. Qdrant**
- [ ] Install/connect Qdrant
- [ ] Load DDC collections
- [ ] Set QDRANT_URL

**4. Test**
- [ ] /start → language
- [ ] Enter works
- [ ] Get estimate

## 🚀 DDC CWICR Text Estimator
### Construction Cost Estimation Bot

**Version:** 11.0 AI Nodes
**Author:** DataDrivenConstruction.io

**All AI via n8n Credentials:**
- 🤖 Parse Text (OpenAI/Claude/Gemini)
- 🤖 Transform Query
- 🤖 Rerank Results
- 📊 Embeddings (OpenAI)

**Features:**
- 💬 Text input
- 🌍 9 languages
- 🔍 Vector search
- 📊 HTML/Excel/PDF

**No API keys in code!**
Use n8n Credentials only.

## 🌍 UI Messages

Telegram interface elements:
- Language selection menu
- Text input prompts
- Edit options
- Help text
- Error messages
- Progress indicators

All localized in Config node.

**Customization:**
Edit LANG object in Config
to modify any UI text.

## 🔀 Route Switch

**11 Actions:**

| # | Action | Description |
|---|--------|-------------|
| 0 | show_lang | Language menu |
| 1 | lang_selected | Confirm & prompt |
| 2 | works_updated | After edit |
| 3 | calculate | Start calculation |
| 4 | edit | Show edit menu |
| 5 | export_excel | CSV download |
| 6 | export_pdf | PDF download |
| 7 | view_details | Resource details |
| 8 | help | Help message |
| 9 | restart | New session |
| 10 | fallback | Error handler |

## 🌐 Config & Localization

**9 Languages:**
DE, EN, RU, ES, FR, PT, ZH, AR, HI

**Contains:**
- UI messages (buttons, prompts)
- Currency symbols (€/$₽¥)
- Database mapping
- Search language names

**Auto-selects:**
- Qdrant collection by language
- Currency by region
- UI text localization

**Customizable:**
- Add new languages in LANG object
- Modify button labels
- Change currency defaults

## 🧠 Main Router

Central message handler.

**Input:** Telegram Update

**Processing:**
1. Parse message/callback
2. Manage user sessions
3. Detect content type
4. Route to action

**Output:** `action` code (0-10)

**Session Storage:**
- User language
- Work items list
- Calculation results
- State machine

parameters.content:
## 🔄 Block 6: Calculation Loop

**Per Work Item:**
```
Prep → LLM Transform → Embed → 
Qdrant Search → Rerank → Calculate
```

**Vector Search:**
- OpenAI text-embedding-3-small
- Qdrant similarity search
- LLM reranking (best match)

**Output per item:**
- Matched rate code
- Unit cost
- Total cost
- Resources breakdown
- Scope of work

## 📊 Block 7: Reports

**Final Processing:**
```
Aggregate → Generate HTML → Send
```
**Report Contents:**
- Work items with costs
- Resources (labor/material/machine)
- Scope of work
- Quality indicators
- Cost breakdown charts

## 📥 Block 8: Export

**Available Exports:**
- 📊 **Excel (CSV)** — Spreadsheet
- 📄 **PDF** — Document
- 🌐 **HTML** — Interactive

**View Details button:**
- Full resource breakdown
- Scope of work
- Quality scores

**Data includes:**
- Rate codes
- Unit prices
- Labor hours
- Material costs

## 🔍 Qdrant Vector DB

**Collections (9 languages):**
- `DDC_CWICR_DE` — German
- `DDC_CWICR_EN` — English
- `DDC_CWICR_RU` — Russian
- `DDC_CWICR_ES` — Spanish
- `DDC_CWICR_FR` — French
- `DDC_CWICR_PT` — Portuguese
- `DDC_CWICR_ZH` — Chinese
- `DDC_CWICR_AR` — Arabic
- `DDC_CWICR_HI` — Hindi

**Setup:**
1. Install Qdrant
2. Load collections from DDC repo
3. Configure QDRANT_URL

**Each collection:** ~55,000 vectors

## 🤖 AI Parse Text

**Purpose:** Extract works from user text

**Models (enable ONE):**
- ✓ OpenAI Model 1 (gpt-4o-mini)
- ○ Claude Model 1 (disabled)
- ○ Gemini Model 1 (disabled)

**To switch:** Disable current, enable other

## 🤖 AI Transform & Rerank

**Transform:** Optimize search query
**Rerank:** Score candidates 0-100































**Models per stage:**
- OpenAI Model 2/3 (active)
- Claude Model 2/3 (disabled)
- Gemini Model 2/3 (disabled)

**To switch models:**
1. Disable current model node
2. Enable alternative model
3. Connects automatically

## ⚠️ Setup 🔑 TOKEN

**Edit TOKEN node values:**

- `bot_token` → Telegram token
- `QDRANT_URL` → Qdrant server

**Error "resource not found"?**
→ bot_token is invalid

**Get token:** @BotFather → /newbot

## 🧮 Embeddings

**Settings in Config Embed:**
- `model`: text-embedding-3-large
- `dimensions`: 3072

**Change model:**
Edit 🔧 Config Embed node

**Credentials:**
Uses n8n OpenAI credential in 3️⃣ Embeddings API

## 🧠 Available AI Models

Connect any model to LLM Chain nodes:

- **OpenAI** — GPT-4o (default)
- **Anthropic** — Claude 3.5
- **Google Gemini** — Gemini Pro
- **OpenRouter** — Multiple models
- **xAI Grok** — Grok models

Models are used for:
- Header analysis
- Category classification
- Project type detection
- Phase generation
- Work decomposition
- Validation
